name: @flyfish-group/file-viewer-workspace
description: Flyfish File Viewer modular monorepo: TypeScript core, on-demand renderers, presets, standard component packages, demos, official site, and documentation
author: Wangyu <wybaby168@gmail.com>

scripts.build:renderer-packages: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm --filter './packages/renderers/**' build && pnpm --filter './packages/presets/**' build
scripts.build:component-packages: pnpm build:vue3 && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer3 build && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery-full build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte-full build
scripts.type-check:core: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/pptx type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-pdf type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-ofd type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-presentation type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-word type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-cad type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-drawing type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/geometry-engine type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-3d type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-typst type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-archive type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-email type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-epub type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-text type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-image type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-media type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-mindmap type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-geo type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-data type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/eda-layout type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/eda-orcad type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-eda type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-all type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-lite type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-office type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-engineering type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vite-plugin type-check
scripts.type-check:components: pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web type-check && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react type-check && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer type-check && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery-full type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte-full type-check
scripts.format: prettier --write apps packages scripts test docs *.md
scripts.verify:browser-smoke: pnpm build:component-demo && pnpm verify:demo-browser-smoke && pnpm verify:component-browser-smoke
scripts.verify:renderer-standalone-smoke: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm --filter './packages/renderers/**' build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vite-plugin build && node scripts/verify-renderer-standalone-smoke.mjs --all
scripts.verify:cold-install-time: pnpm build:renderer-packages && pnpm build:vue3 && node scripts/verify-cold-install-time.mjs
scripts.verify:cold-install-time:fast: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-text build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-image build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-media build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-lite build && pnpm build:vue3 && node scripts/verify-cold-install-time.mjs --target=core --target=vue3 --target=vue3-lite
scripts.verify:migration-gates: pnpm type-check && pnpm type-check:core && pnpm build-only && pnpm docs:build && pnpm verify:docs-portal && pnpm verify:format-support && pnpm verify:ecosystem-readmes && pnpm verify:offline-assets && pnpm verify:smoke-matrix && pnpm verify:experience-baseline && pnpm verify:branch-roles && pnpm verify:core-api && pnpm verify:core-framework-neutral && pnpm verify:core-dependency-budget && pnpm verify:renderer-contracts && pnpm verify:renderer-assets && pnpm verify:eda-layout-webgl && pnpm verify:on-demand-boundaries && pnpm verify:vite-plugin-auto-scan && pnpm verify:vite-plugin-format-coverage && pnpm verify:renderer-standalone-smoke && pnpm verify:install-budget && pnpm verify:cold-install-time:fast && pnpm verify:bundle-budget && pnpm components:verify --source-only && pnpm verify:wrapper-api && pnpm verify:wrapper-options && pnpm verify:compatibility-api && pnpm verify:compatibility-readmes && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && pnpm verify:ecosystem-tarballs && pnpm release:ecosystem:list
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build-only && pnpm verify:demo-output && node scripts/deploy-cloudflare-pages.mjs
scripts.release:components:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --pack-dir .release/components
scripts.release:components:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.release:ecosystem:build: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/pptx build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-pdf build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-ofd build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-presentation build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-word build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-cad build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-drawing build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/geometry-engine build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-3d build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-typst build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-archive build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-email build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-epub build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-text build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-image build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-media build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-mindmap build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-geo build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-data build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/eda-layout build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/eda-orcad build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/renderer-eda build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-all build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-lite build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-office build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/preset-engineering build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vite-plugin build && pnpm build:viewer-assets && pnpm build:component-packages && pnpm obfuscate && pnpm components:export && pnpm verify:offline-assets && pnpm verify:production-entrypoints
scripts.release:ecosystem:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --clean
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish:dry-run: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish --dry-run
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:publish:preflight && pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.components:export: pnpm components:readme && pnpm core:export && node scripts/sync-wrapper-repos.mjs && pnpm components:verify
scripts.components:standalone-smoke: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm build:component-packages && pnpm components:export && node scripts/verify-wrapper-standalone-builds.mjs
scripts.components:gitee:publish: pnpm components:gitee:preflight && pnpm components:gitee:create && pnpm components:export && node scripts/publish-wrapper-repos.mjs --host=gitee --push && pnpm verify:wrapper-public-remotes --host=gitee
